KJ

SCHOOL OF COMPUTATIONAL AND PHYSICAL SCIENCES

DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE

O R G A N I S E S

BUILD COOL PROJECTS,
WIN COOL REWARDS

SOFTWARE

Build apps, websites, or anything digital. Got an idea? Turn it into something people can actually use.

HARDWARE

Work with sensors, boards, and cool gadgets. Make stuff that moves, reacts, and exists in real life.

COMBINATION

Why choose one? Mix both. Build something where hardware + software work together and do works really cool.

BUILD WHATEVER YOU LIKE!

You don't need to know how to code. You don't need to be an expert. Explore Skyfall through interactive side quests across various domains.

10+

OUR MENTORS

At Skyfall, we have 10+ mentors, including past record-breaking hackathon winners, ready to guide you through every step. Whether you need advice, help refining your idea, or support fixing bugs, we've got you covered.

We know that sometimes you get stuck, and that is completely normal, especially when it is your first time. We totally understand that.

NOT SURE WHERE TO START?

Click on generate to generate an idea.....

AGENDA

07:30 AM - 08:30 AMDoors Open
09:00 AM - 10:00 AMOpening Ceremony
10:00 AM - 01:00 PMHacking Continues
01:00 PM - 02:00 PMLunch Break
03:00 PM - 04:00 PMActivity : Will be revealed later
04:00 PM - 05:00 PMMentoring
05:00 PM - 06:00 PMPolishing Projects and Submissions
06:00 PM - 07:00 PMJudging + Evening Snacks
07:00 PM - 08:00 PMValedictory / Closing Note

FAQ

Who is eligible?

Skyfall is for highschoolers! You don't need to be a pro to join.

Will food be provided?

Yes, meals and snacks will be provided. We will arrange for food sensitivities to the best of our ability.

My parents are concerned..

We're here to help! They can reach out to us directly for any safety or logistics questions.

Can beginners participate?

Skyfall is for all skill levels! We'll have mentors to help you get started.

What do I need to bring?

Your laptop, charger, and an open mind. We'll handle the rest!

LIMITED SEATS AVAILABLE!

WHERE TO BE ?
